name: BEAST CRIMES
short_description: Crimes across the times. Are you able to solve them all?
detailed_description:
A beastly crime investigation drama across times! Are you able to solve the thrilling mysteries in Beast Crimes?


2 cases set in the far-future Neo Tokyo!

  • Ranking system: Track and improve your different skills. How good you are at each will increase or limit the various options to solve the puzzles.
  • Reaper: Your choices decides which persons are going to die and when.
  • Clock: Decied what to do during your mornings, afternoons, evenings and nights.
  • Escape Rooms: Solve puzzles and escape deadly rooms
  • Clue Tree: Collect clues and unlock new ones with the Clue Tree
  • Cross-examination: Interrogate suspect
  • Moral Tree: Uncover the suspect true morality


3 cases set in the distant past Ancient Egypt!

  • Scale of Justice: Your choice of questions and their answers will decied the fate.
  • The eye of wisdom: See the true thoughts of people who are lying.
  • Dowsing Rod: Use a dowsing rod to find body parts.
  • Negotiation: Observe people's emotions and change your approach depending on them.
  • Widened perspective: Inspect selected areas through panoramic view.


3 cases set in the present 21st Century!

  • Investigation: Study the surrounding and characters then write it down in your journal.
  • Inventory: Collect evidence and show them to suspects for view their reactions.
  • Maps: Several different location to choose to visit.
  • Interrogate: Battle of wits, argument and prove who is behind the crimes.
